name: Codex
description: Codex app-server harness and Codex-managed GPT model catalog.

discovery.label: Model Discovery
discovery.help: Plugin-owned controls for discovering Codex app-server models.

discovery.enabled.label: Enable Discovery
discovery.enabled.help: When false, OpenClaw keeps the Codex harness available but uses the bundled fallback model list.

discovery.timeoutMs.label: Discovery Timeout
discovery.timeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for Codex app-server model discovery before falling back to the bundled model list.

appServer.label: App Server
appServer.help: Runtime controls for connecting to Codex app-server.

appServer.transport.label: Transport
appServer.transport.help: Use stdio to spawn Codex locally, or websocket to connect to an already-running app-server.

appServer.args.label: Arguments
appServer.args.help: Arguments used for stdio transport. Defaults to app-server --listen stdio://.

appServer.url.label: WebSocket URL
appServer.url.help: Codex app-server WebSocket URL when transport is websocket.

appServer.authToken.label: Auth Token
appServer.authToken.help: Bearer token sent to the WebSocket app-server.

appServer.headers.label: Headers
appServer.headers.help: Additional headers sent to the WebSocket app-server.

appServer.requestTimeoutMs.label: Request Timeout
appServer.requestTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for Codex app-server control-plane requests.

appServer.approvalPolicy.label: Approval Policy
appServer.approvalPolicy.help: Codex native approval policy sent to thread start, resume, and turns.

appServer.sandbox.label: Sandbox
appServer.sandbox.help: Codex native sandbox mode sent to thread start and resume.

appServer.approvalsReviewer.label: Approvals Reviewer
appServer.approvalsReviewer.help: Use user approvals or the Codex guardian subagent for native app-server approvals.

appServer.serviceTier.label: Service Tier
appServer.serviceTier.help: Optional Codex service tier passed when starting or resuming threads.
